title: Applications currently open
blurb: Rolling or always-open programs you can approach right now, including standing visa and residency pathways and grants with continuous intake.

title: Opening within twelve months
blurb: Announced opportunities with a known upcoming window. This bucket fills out during a live-date refresh; for now, treat recurring programs below as the pipeline and confirm reopen dates at source.

title: Strong recurring programs (round timing to verify)
blurb: High-value programs that run on annual or batch cycles. The present round may be open or closed, so check the current call before you plan around it.

title: Relocation and foreign-founder attraction packages
blurb: Soft-landing packages, startup and talent visas, and free-zone setups designed to attract founders from abroad. Relocation is often optional, temporary or supported.

title: Research, university and laboratory opportunities
blurb: Funded research placements, residencies and lab access that turn a long-horizon idea into credible, supported science.

title: Government and corporate paid-pilot opportunities
blurb: Routes to a paid pilot or procurement with a government, city or corporate partner, plus real deployment sites and reference customers.

title: Social-impact, nonprofit and sustainable-development
blurb: Non-dilutive funding for social enterprises, community organisations and mission-led work aligned to the SDGs, often individual-friendly.

title: Creative, cultural, music, film and immersive-media
blurb: Grants, prizes and festival labs for immersive storytelling, creative technology, cultural archives and music-visual work, usually IP-friendly.

title: Highly ambitious or unusual wildcards
blurb: The big-swing, high-variance opportunities: multi-million grants and prizes, bespoke sovereign partnerships and long-shot moonshots.
